common.networkError: Sorry, a network error occurred. Please try again later.

landing.subheadline: Rota guides you from topic to plan to execution — step by step, no getting lost.
landing.rotaTaskDesc: Breaks big problems into small steps. Turns "I don't know where to start" into a clear next action.
landing.rotaVibeDesc: Warm and focused. Playful when things are easy, steady when they get hard.
landing.rotaSaysQuote: "Don't try to solve everything at once. Let's just find what's actually blocking you."
landing.featuresSubtitle: Rota steps in at every point where research gets hard — topic, planning, execution.
landing.feature1Desc: Rota listens first, then helps you find where you're actually stuck.
landing.feature2Desc: Complex research becomes small, concrete tasks you can start today.
landing.feature3Desc: Stay focused when your goals feel overwhelming.
landing.feature4Desc: Journals, feedback, and summaries build into a full record of your research journey.
landing.howTitle: From zero to finished — a real path
landing.howSubtitle: Designed to help students actually start, stay on track, and see it through.
landing.stage01Desc: Find a research direction that fits your interests, skills, and schedule.
landing.stage02Desc: Turn a vague idea into a clear, actionable research plan.
landing.stage03Desc: Feedback at every step so your plan doesn't just collect dust.
landing.stage04Desc: Your process becomes journals and growth records — something real.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Rota is here from your very first question — not to do it for you, but to help you move forward.

login.subtitle: From topic selection to execution — Rota guides you through every stage, one clear step at a time.
login.bullet2: Big goals broken into small steps
login.bullet3: Steady support when things get hard
login.rotaSaysQuote: "Don't judge yourself yet. Let's look at the actual problem first."
login.hintLogin: No account? Click "Sign up" above to create one
login.hintRegister: Already have an account? Click "Log in" above

welcome.intro: I'm Rota — your research mentor. No need to have everything figured out. Just tell me where you are, and we'll find the right starting point together.
welcome.rotaQuote: "Do you already have a topic, or are you still looking for one? Either way, we'll work it out."
welcome.noTopicDesc: Rota will learn about your interests, skills, and time — then help you find a research direction that actually fits.
welcome.hasTopicDesc: Share your topic with Rota and we'll turn it into a clear, executable research plan.

topicChat.title: Chat with your AI mentor
topicChat.subtitle: Your mentor will learn about your interests, skills, and schedule through conversation to help find the right research topic
topicChat.defaultHint: If you just want to experience the full flow, you can continue with the default profile. You can always add more information later.
topicChat.tutorStatus: Learning about your interests and skills
topicChat.notesEmpty: Start chatting — Rota will distill your conversation into a quick profile covering interests, skills, time, and preferences.
topicChat.notesFootnote: Distilled by Rota from your conversation, updates as you chat
topicChat.placeholder: Tell your mentor about things you're interested in...
topicChat.initialMessage: Hi! I'm Rota, your research mentor. Before we find your topic, I'd love to learn a bit about you first — what are you interested in, or curious about?

topicProfile.title: Your profile report
topicProfile.subtitle: This report was generated by your AI mentor based on your conversation. Please confirm if it's accurate.
topicProfile.defaultNotice: This is a default profile draft to help you quickly experience the topic selection flow. If anything is off, you can add more information before continuing.
topicProfile.generating: Your AI mentor is generating your profile report...
topicProfile.supplementDesc: You can upload PDF files and add written notes to help your mentor understand you better
topicProfile.textPlaceholder: Add anything you'd like your mentor to know — existing research experience, areas you're especially interested in, your current learning situation, etc...
topicProfile.uploadHint: Click to upload PDF, Word, image, or other files
topicProfile.uploadFailed: File upload failed, please try again
topicProfile.fileDescPlaceholder: Add a note about this file, e.g.: This is a short paper I wrote last semester...
topicProfile.submitSupplement: Submit additional info and regenerate profile
topicProfile.defaultProfile: A high school student with genuine curiosity about technology and social issues. Has foundational skills in information search and data organization, with a natural ability to observe everyday phenomena and ask questions. A great fit to start their research journey with social investigation or experimental observation projects.
topicProfile.defaultInterests: Artificial Intelligence, Psychology, Environmental Science, Social Media
topicProfile.defaultSkills: Information retrieval, Data organization, Presentation design, Basic statistics
topicProfile.defaultPreference: Prefers empirical research; wants topics that connect to real life

topicKeywords.title: Choose directions you're interested in
topicKeywords.subtitle: Check the research directions that interest you — you can select multiple
topicKeywords.confirm: Confirm ({count} selected) and see related research

topicReferences.title: Reference research list
topicReferences.subtitle: These are research cases related to your selected directions — check the ones that interest you

topicRecommend.title: Topic recommendations
topicRecommend.subtitle: Topic selection results · Choose a topic to create your project
topicRecommend.subtitle2: Your mentor is introducing and explaining the recommended topics — ask questions by text or voice
topicRecommend.placeholder: Type your question, or click the microphone to speak...
topicRecommend.initialMsg1: Based on your interests, I've picked 3 research topics for you. Let me walk you through them!
topicRecommend.initialMsg2: Here's the first one — click the card to expand. Tell me which one you like, or ask anything.

topicConfirm.titleHasTopic: Fill in your existing topic information
topicConfirm.titleConfirm: Review the information below and confirm to start
topicConfirm.fieldPlaceholder: e.g., Psychology, Environmental Science, Computer Science
topicConfirm.descPlaceholder: Briefly describe what you want to research and your goal

planOverview.mentorMsg: Your topic is broken into {phases} phases — from literature review through data analysis to final report. Follow the plan and you'll finish in {weeks} weeks.

planDetail.title: Full plan details
planDetail.confirmBtn: Confirm plan and open research map
planDetail.placeholder: Tell your mentor what you'd like to change...
planDetail.initialMsg: Your plan has {phases} phases. What would you like to change — timeline, task load, content, or something specific?

phase.initialMsg: You're currently in the "{phaseName}" phase. The goal is: {goal}. Any questions? I can help you think it through!

task.explainHint: Not sure how to do it? Check the detailed guide
task.submitPlaceholder: Enter your research findings, experiment records, or report content here...
task.placeholder: What don't you understand? Ask me...
task.initialMsg: I see you're working on "{taskTitle}". What guidance do you need? I won't give you direct answers, but I'll help you think it through!

taskExplain.title: Task explanation
taskExplain.networkError: Sorry, a network error occurred. Please try again later.

taskHint.title: Hint assistance
taskHint.intro: Don't worry! Here are some guides to help you complete this task.
taskHint.warning: Note: Using a hint limits your maximum score for this task to C.
taskHint.placeholder: Using the template and tips above, complete your work again...
taskHint.tip1: It doesn't need to be perfect — focus on the thinking process
taskHint.tip2: Feel free to draw inspiration from the task explanation

taskSubmit.loading: Your AI mentor is reviewing your submission...
taskSubmit.title: Review results
taskSubmit.hintUsed: Hint was used — maximum score for this submission is C

map.activePhaseMsg: You're in the "{name}" phase — keep it up!
map.welcomeMsg: Welcome to the research map! Click an island to see task details.

journal.title: Research Journal
journal.subtitle: The system automatically records your research journey from a first-person perspective
journal.emptyHint: Journal entries are generated automatically when you complete tasks, submit work, or adjust your plan

adjust.title: Adjust your plan
adjust.subtitle: Choose the type of adjustment you'd like to make
adjust.option1Desc: Want to change your weekly commitment or overall project duration? Discuss with your mentor and reschedule.
adjust.option2Desc: Tasks feeling too hard or too easy? Your mentor can help recalibrate the current phase's tasks.
adjust.option3Desc: Want to research something completely different? Your current project will be archived, and you'll start topic selection fresh.
adjust.initialMsg: Adjustments are a normal part of research — what would you like to change? Timeline, difficulty, or something else?

admin.triggerPlaceholder: When should this strategy be triggered?
admin.promptHint: These are the system instructions sent to the AI. When left empty, the built-in default placeholder strategy is used. When filled in, the system will use this content.
admin.promptPlaceholder:
Enter prompt template...

Example:
You are a warm and professional research mentor chatting with a high school student. Your goal is...
